extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates “Cases against” from “Cases by”: I counted only against rows, namely criminal proceedings of 0 for the Company, 0 for subsidiaries, 0 for promoters and 0 for directors; statutory/regulatory actions of 4 + 9 + 4 + 6 = 23; and tax proceedings of 5 for the Company plus 7 for subsidiaries = 12. I excluded all “By” rows and excluded promoter/director personal matters from the aggregate amount; the group litigation totals used were the stated Company total of ₹26.94 million and Subsidiary total of ₹83.91 million, aggregating to ₹110.85 million = ₹11.085 crore. The contingent-liabilities table is dated June 30, 2021 and uses ₹ million; because no stated Total row is provided, its disclosed components of ₹74.37 million + ₹22.25 million + ₹35.58 million were summed to ₹132.20 million = ₹13.22 crore. The disclosed concentration percentages concern top five vendors’ share of total GMV from online sales, not company-wide revenue from operations or total income, and no company-wide top-five or top-ten customer revenue percentage is provided; the source unit is million and conversion to crore is by dividing by 10.
